name: Azure Service Bus Channel
description: Azure Service Bus queue channel adapter - inbound message receive and reply dispatch via Service Bus queues

configSchema.description: Service Bus connection string from the Azure portal Shared Access Policy. Takes precedence over fullyQualifiedNamespace. Omit to use managed identity via fullyQualifiedNamespace.

Fully-qualified Service Bus namespace (e.g. my-namespace.servicebus.windows.net). When set and connectionString is empty, the adapter authenticates with managed identity via DefaultAzureCredential. Required for namespaces created with disableLocalAuth: true.
Name of the Service Bus queue the adapter listens on for inbound messages.
Default queue for outbound replies when the inbound envelope does not specify a replyTo queue.
Maximum number of messages processed concurrently by the Service Bus processor.
